The sum of these values equals three hundred ten as required.

Total weeks become thirty after the delay hits all five parts.

Fortune will guide the team through this hard stretch ahead.
We must track progress with care to avoid further slips.
Resource shifts are needed to keep the work moving fast.

Team leads will adjust their daily tasks to fit the new plan.

The project moves forward with a firm grip on the timeline.
Success depends on steady effort from every person involved.
We will finish the work within the updated window of time.
The final phase takes the most hours of all five stages.
Fortune favors those who adapt quickly to sudden changes.
